title: Extraction and Lowry-Assay for Determination of Synechocystis Total Protein
author: Anika Wiegard
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.taseiee

steps.title: Sample 1 ml of your Synechocystis...
steps.instruction: Sample 1 ml of your Synechocystis culture in 2 ml Eppendorf tubes.

steps.title: Add 110 µl of 100% trichloracetic...
steps.instruction: Add 110 µl of 100% trichloracetic acid and incubate the mixture on ice for 20 min. 00:20:00, Incubation on ice

steps.title: Centrifuge your mixture for 10 min...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge your mixture for 10 min at 15,000 g at 4 °C. 00:10:00, Centrifugation

steps.title: Discard the supernatant thoroughly and place...
steps.instruction: Discard the supernatant thoroughly and place the tubes upright for 10 min. Tap the upright tubes carefully until all liquid is removed.

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet carefully in 500...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet carefully in 500 µl of a 1 M NaOH solution. Vortex and incubate the samples over night (approx. 16 hours) at room temperature.

steps.title: Prepare a Lowry solution by mixing...
steps.instruction: Prepare a Lowry solution by mixing the following reagents in the given order: 500 µl K-Na-tartrate (2%) 500 µl Cu 2 SO 4 *5 H 2 O (1%) 100 ml Na 2 CO 3 (2%) Scale the total volumes down to an appropriate amount. You will need 900 µl Lowry-Mix for each sample. Mix the Lowry-solution on the same day you use it and store it in the fridge in the meantime.

steps.title: In a new 1
steps.instruction: In a new 1.5 ml Eppendorf tube, mix 100 µl sample (in NaOH) and 900 µl Lowry-Mix.

steps.title: Add 100 µl 50% Folin &...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µl 50% Folin & Ciocalteu's phenol reagent ( diluted in water). Immediately incubate in the dark for 45 min. 00:45:00, Incubation in the dark

steps.title: Spin down your incubated solution at...
steps.instruction: Spin down your incubated solution at 14,000 g for 5 min to remove lipids and cell debris. 00:05:00, Centrifugation

steps.title: Carefully transfer 1 ml of your...
steps.instruction: Carefully transfer 1 ml of your Sample-Lowry-Folin-Mix into a plastic cuvette and measure extinction at 750 nm.

steps.title: For absolute quantification, prepare a standard...
steps.instruction: For absolute quantification, prepare a standard BSA concentration range from 5 to 100 µg/ml, and follow all steps above with your standard sample. go to step #1
